action.reasoning: Observation: DINOv2 best=0.6174, CLIP=0.5786. Per-class they're complementary - DINOv2 better at squirrel(0.37vs0.14), empty(0.75vs0.51), dog(0.89vs0.80); CLIP better at bird(0.43vs0.37), bobcat(0.37vs0.33), cat(0.65vs0.59), opossum(0.61vs0.54). Analysis: Ensemble of both models should combine strengths and improve balanced accuracy. Also have swa.pt (val 0.8257) untested. Decision: Write ensemble predict.py loading both DINOv2+CLIP models with TTA, submit eval immediately.
action.command: python -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('predict.py').read()); print('predict.py syntax OK')"
